title: Knowledge Distillation, Live
tagline: A small student copies a big teacher's softened predictions — and beats hard-label training
summary: Watch a tiny linear student trained in your browser absorb a smooth pretrained teacher's 'dark knowledge' through softmax temperature. Toggle hard-only vs KD-only vs hybrid losses, slide the temperature T, and see the student's decision boundary snap to the teacher's much faster than hard labels alone allow.
highlights: Live in-browser training of a tiny student against a hand-tuned smooth teacher.
Toggle three loss recipes (hard CE, pure KD, KD+CE hybrid) and watch the accuracy gap.
Slide the temperature T to expose 'dark knowledge' — the relative-class structure that hard labels throw away.
Decision-boundary canvas updates every 4 gradient steps so the geometry of the transfer is visible.
